name: io.github.kartegagithub/laviya-agent-skills
description: Laviya AI Orchestration MCP runtime for IDE and agent integrations.

environmentVariables.description: Laviya API key used for MCP runtime authentication.
environmentVariables.name: LAVIYA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional base URL override for the Laviya API endpoint.
environmentVariables.name: LAVIYA_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional agent UID override for execution orchestration.
environmentVariables.name: LAVIYA_AGENT_UID
